title: 日本ダービーの後に・下は見ない！

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Did you see me cross the finish line?! Were you
amazed?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hehe! That's what I like to hear!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But I really wanted to do the Double Crown
peace sign in the winner's circle...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio's disappointment at not being able to
make it to Symboli Rudolf's level shows through.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: ...Ugh, I need to pull myself together!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Sure, I feel super angry I can't become a Triple
Crown champion...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But staying down in the dumps isn't gonna help
me beat Prez! I have to keep walking forward to
reach her!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
So I gotta move right on and focus on the next
race! It's the last of the Classics...
choice_data_list: The Kikuka Sho! You better give it your all!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I'll get straight back to training tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ah, hehe... Seems like I'm a bit tired. My foot's
cramping.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our push for the last Crown race, the Kikuka Sho,
starts now!
